_comment: Copy this to board-config.json and fill in your board's IDs. See adapters/<your-adapter>/README.md for setup instructions. The structure below is for GitHub Projects — other adapters may have different platform-specific fields.
_platform_specific_comment: Fields below this line are specific to the github-projects adapter. Other adapters (e.g., linear, jira) will have their own platform-specific fields. See the adapter README for the required config shape.

fields._comment: These core fields are required by all adapters. The id/options format may vary by platform.
